summary: Frontend translation testing completed. Code review found MISSING AI translations in English (ai.title, ai.subtitle, ai.howCanIHelp, etc.) which were fixed by adding 27 new AI translation keys to EN section. French translations verified working on onboarding page. Playwright login automation blocked by React Native Web button click handling.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AI translations (ai.title, ai.subtitle, ai.howCanIHelp, ai.intro, ai.suggestions, etc.) were MISSING from English translations - Added 27 translation keys to EN section in /app/frontend/i18n/translations.ts
settings.logout key exists in all 3 languages (FR/EN/ES) - working correctly
Profile page uses t('settings.logout') for logout button - correct
AI page uses t('ai.title'), t('ai.subtitle'), t('ai.howCanIHelp') - now all languages supported
News page categories (All, Macro, Institutional, Tech, Bullish, Bearish, Neutral) exist in all languages
French onboarding page verified: Bienvenue, Apprenez le Crypto, Suivez les Marchés, Commencer, Se connecter - all showing correctly

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Translations verified via code review and partial UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI English translations were added to /app/frontend/i18n/translations.ts lines 893-919 (27 new keys). Playwright automated testing is blocked by React Native Web button click handling - the login button doesn't respond to programmatic clicks. Manual testing recommended for language switching flow: Profile -> Language selector -> Select EN/ES -> Navigate to pages to verify. The t() function is correctly used in all pages (profile.tsx, ai.tsx, market.tsx, news.tsx, index.tsx).

ai_translations_added: ai.subtitle: Ask your questions about crypto
ai.howCanIHelp: How can I help you?
english.status: FIXED - translations were missing and have been added

spanish.status: VERIFIED via code review - all translations present

testing_limitations.playwright_login_blocked: React Native Web buttons don't respond to programmatic clicks (uses TouchableOpacity which translates to div with role='button'). Manual testing required.
testing_limitations.result: None worked - React Native Web event handling requires native touch events
